title: Chat Tweaks - HeightFix
description: Adjusts the Minecraft chat position to appear above the armor bar, preventing overlap and improving on-screen clarity.
body:
Chat Position Enhancer

The Minecraft chat window often overlaps with important HUD elements such as the armor bar, reducing visibility and causing distractions. Chat Position Enhancer fixes this by moving the chat window above the armor bar, ensuring a clean, unobstructed interface.

This lightweight mod improves your gameplay experience by keeping both chat and HUD elements clearly visible without any configuration needed. Just install and enjoy a tidier screen.

Key Features

  • ✔ Moves chat window above the armor bar to prevent overlap
  • ✔ Ensures full readability of chat and HUD elements
  • ✔ Lightweight and efficient with minimal performance impact
  • ✔ No setup required — works right out of the box
  • ✔ Compatible with vanilla Minecraft HUD and most mods

Why Use This Mod?

Whether you’re a casual player or competitive gamer, a clean HUD enhances your focus and gameplay. This mod prevents annoying overlaps, making your screen neater and information easier to read.

For more information, visit the GitHub page, check out the Modrinth profile, or join the community on Discord.
